synopsis: "MedStar: Intermezzo" is a short story written by Michael Reaves and Steve Perry, published in Star Wars Insider 83 and Star Wars: The Official Magazine 65. It takes place between the novels MedStar I: Battle Surgeons and MedStar II: Jedi Healer and features characters from the two novels. In March 2008, the story was archived on Hyperspace.
title: MedStar: Intermezzo
